stocks.impact_theory: Trump administration nearing $500M rescue package including loan and warrants for up to 90% stake post-bankruptcy. Economically, prevents job losses (14k) and airline capacity reduction amid high fuel costs from Iran tensions. Psychologically, boosts confidence in govt support for strategic sectors, FOMO buying. Historical parallel: 2020 CARES Act airline bailouts spurred +200% rallies. Analogies: Like a lifeline to a sinking ship turning it into a yacht; govt backstop as 'put option' on distressed assets.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Rescue news caused intraday surge; X sentiment positive on survival odds despite criticism of bailouts. Web news confirms advanced talks, high volume indicates momentum continuation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +50-100% gains if deal closes; target $2.50.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short post-pump if deal fails; potential -30%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal collapse, dilution from warrants, ongoing bankruptcy.

stocks.justification: Concrete news from WSJ/CNBC, massive volume shift, historical precedents strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings post-close: Exp EPS $0.33-0.37, Rev $22B; focus on FSD/Robotaxi/Optimus amid EV slowdown. Econ: Signals AI pivot viability. Psych: High anticipation, Elon updates drive volatility. Historical: Post-earnings swings avg 10%, 2024 robotaxi delay -12%. Analogies: Earnings as 'black box' reveal - treasure or bomb; narrative shift like iPhone launch eclipsing hardware misses.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X buzz on AI metrics; analysts bullish on autonomy. Consensus beat likely, energy storage record.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls for 15%+ if AI beats; target $280.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Delivery miss, capex fears, China competition.

stocks.justification: Earnings uncertainty high, but positive X sentiment and analyst PTs supportive.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 rev $22.2B up on 143 deliveries (vs 130 prior). Econ: Recovery in production amid supply chain ease. Psych: Relief on execution post-crises. Historical: Delivery beats +5-10% moves. Analogies: Like a phoenix rising from safety scandals; steady deliveries as heartbeat stabilizing valuation.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Solid results beat fears; X/news positive on ramp-up.

stocks.justification: Actual results positive, but ongoing challenges temper.

stocks.impact_theory: Slashed FY26 EPS to $7-11 from $12-14 on fuel surge from Iran war. Econ: Higher costs pressure margins across airlines. Psych: Fear contagion to sector. Historical: Fuel spikes 2022 -20% drops. Analogies: Fuel as rising tide sinking boats; outlook cut like storm warning grounding flights.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Cut due to geopolitics; X sentiment negative.

stocks.justification: Explicit guidance cut, tied to macro fuel.

stocks.impact_theory: Top S&P gainer +4.5% on tech rally, AI chip demand. Econ: Semis lead market amid ceasefire hopes. Psych: Momentum chasing. Historical: AI hype waves +10% days. Analogies: Riding AI tsunami; coattails of NVDA surge.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Market leader in movers; positive sentiment.
